hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then DIR="$FILE"; while [ "$DIR" != "/" ]; do DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); if [ -f "$DIR/eslint.config.cjs" ]; then (cd "$DIR" && npx eslint --fix "$FILE") 2>/dev/null || true; break; fi; done; fi
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|scss)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
